title: v2.0 AI Team Mode — architecture audit + MVP plan

transitions.note: Architecture audit complete. Existing schema fully covers MVP needs (mode_slug='ai-team-mode' already in DB constraint, tasks.settings JSONB stores team config, model_responses rows store step outputs). No migration required for MVP. Plan doc written at 42-v2-ai-team-mode-plan.md. Follow-up PRs: PR17 (no migration needed, skip), PR18 server helpers, PR19 /api/team-run route, PR20 /team UI, PR21 history integration, PR22 stabilization.
Team Mode PRs PR18-PR22 all merged on main.
All checks verified on main post-merge.
All Team Mode PRs (PR18-PR22) implemented and merged. Stabilized in v2.0.0-alpha.1.

notes: Architecture audit and MVP plan are complete. PR18-PR22 were implemented and merged on main; Team Mode runtime now includes src/lib/arena/team-mode.ts, POST /api/team-run, /team UI, auth gate, backend ENABLE_TEAM_MODE gate, and route/unit coverage. Next tracked step is V200-02: production env activation with Upstash Redis, ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_TEAM_MODE=true, redeploy, and production smoke.
